## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Alfredo Caballero of Aerotaxi La Costeña for potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aerotaxi La Costeña seeks to leverage AI for content creation to boost global presence for two airlines: La Costeña (Nicaragua) and Sansa (Costa Rica)](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation with human expertise, publishing 5 articles/week at $15k/month + $30k strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Alfredo is interested but needs to present to management; timeline for potential start is 2026](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

## Topics

### Client Background and Needs

  - [Two airlines under Regional Holdings: La Costeña (Nicaragua, 30 years old) and Sansa (Costa Rica, 25+ years old)](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Seeking to increase global presence, especially for US/German/UK travelers](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Currently working with a freelancer for SEO, looking for more structured approach](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Content focus: B2C ecotourism, not directly pushing airline services](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### GrowthX Services Overview

  - [AI-powered content creation with human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint ($30k) + 12-month growth execution ($15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Publish 5 articles/week, \~240 articles/year](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Custom workflows for research, drafting, fact-checking, and expert review](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Platform evolving to allow client collaboration and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Uses multiple AI models and research tools (e.g., SEMrush, Ahrefs)](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Fact-checking process to prevent AI hallucinations](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [Human experts involved in review and editing](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Can create content in multiple languages and for specific demographics](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Client Concerns and Questions

  - [Data security and content accuracy for airline industry](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Ability to review and control published content](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Potential for creating content for two separate brands](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [ROI and case studies, especially in travel/tourism sector](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)

### Next Steps and Timeline

  - [Alfredo to discuss pricing and potential with management](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [GrowthX to send additional resources and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call with CFO if project scope aligns](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2578.0)
  - [Target start date: January 2026](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send travel industry examples and ROI details to Alfredo](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Alfredo to discuss potential partnership with general manager](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [If aligned on scope and budget, schedule follow-up call with CFO](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2578.0)
  - [Determine if January 2026 start date works for both parties](https://fathom.video/share/HykRme53szZtEEv1VnHr9AFE-45Tgruv?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
